references.title: DesignRush Best Website Designs 2026
references.why_fit: Enterprise-style award index useful for hierarchy, restrained surface contrast, and scan-first section grouping.
references.transfer_pattern: Use restrained cards, clear section headers, and stronger grouping instead of decorative hero treatment.
references.avoid_pattern: Avoid marketing-like oversized imagery or hero composition in an operational dashboard.

references.title: Awwwards Nominees
references.why_fit: Awwwards nominees are useful for typography discipline, high-contrast surfaces, and premium spacing treatment.
references.transfer_pattern: Use sharper micro-hierarchy, stronger active states, and careful whitespace around dense content.
references.avoid_pattern: Avoid expressive portfolio motion or oversized art direction in a trading workflow.

transferable_elements: Compact evidence/status strips above dense sections to orient users before reading charts.
Sharper active-state contrast and understated card elevation for repeatable scanning.
Section labels with restrained accent markers rather than large marketing headers.
Operational warnings should remain prominent but secondary scores can stay visible for audit.
